description: Link files and folders between vaults so they share the same content on disk, with per-file exclude rules for things you want to keep vault-specific (e.g. themes). - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: ArmaLv
manifest.description: Link files and folders between vaults so they share the same content on disk, with per-file exclude rules for things you want to keep vault-specific (e.g. themes).
manifest.name: Vault Link
